query: SELECT configKey, CASE WHEN configValue IS NOT NULL AND configValue != '' THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 5), '***') ELSE '(未設定)' END AS masked_value FROM site_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'line_%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 28JPo3Vw26mPY6V.root --database XBhqXuJ2WiY8ShtDj5vvMz --execute SELECT configKey, CASE WHEN configValue IS NOT NULL AND configValue != '' THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 5), '***') ELSE '(未設定)' END AS masked_value FROM site_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'line_%';
